content:
The information that "Will Smith will star in 'Men in Black'" as an upcoming project might be a misunderstanding or outdated. Will Smith famously starred in the original "Men in Black" film series, with the first movie released in 1997, followed by sequels in 2002 and 2012 (although he was not in the 2012 installment). 

As of my latest information up to mid-2024, there has been no official announcement that Will Smith is returning to star in a new "Men in Black" film. The franchise did have a spin-off titled "Men in Black: International" in 2019, which starred Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, but Will Smith was not involved.

If you encountered a claim that Will Smith will star in a new "Men in Black" movie, it could be speculative or based on rumors rather than confirmed news. For the most accurate and current updates on Will Smith's projects, it's best to check official announcements from studios or reliable entertainment news sources. If you want, I can help look for any recent updates about his upcoming roles.
